where.if: ( mo.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') /* 자재명 검색도 지원 (성능 OK) */ OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM material_order_item moi2 JOIN material m2 ON m2.material_id = moi2.material_id WHERE moi2.order_id = mo.order_id AND m2.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )

if.test: status != null and status != '' and status != 'ALL'

mapper.sql: ( SELECT moi.order_id, SUM(moi.order_quantity) AS total_qty, SUM(moi.total_price) AS total_price, MIN(m.material_name) AS rep_name, COUNT(*) AS item_cnt, MAX(moi.warehouse_code) AS warehouse_code FROM material_order_item moi JOIN material m ON m.material_id = moi.material_id GROUP BY moi.order_id ) oi
mapper.select:
SELECT mo.order_id AS orderId, mo.supplier_id AS supplierId, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, mo.order_date AS orderDate, mo.order_status AS orderStatus, mo.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate, mo.created_by AS createdBy, mo.handled_by AS handledBy, hu.name AS handlerName, mo.note,
/* 대표 품명 */ CASE WHEN oi.item_cnt = 1 THEN oi.rep_name WHEN oi.item_cnt >= 2 THEN CONCAT(oi.rep_name, ' 외 ', oi.item_cnt - 1, '건') ELSE '-' END AS materialName,
COALESCE(oi.total_qty, 0) AS totalQuantity, COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0) AS totalPrice, oi.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode
FROM material_order mo LEFT JOIN supplier s ON s.supplier_id = mo.supplier_id LEFT JOIN ON oi.order_id = mo.order_id LEFT JOIN admin_user hu ON hu.admin_id = mo.handled_by
ORDER BY mo.order_id ${sortOrder}
ORDER BY mo.order_date ${sortOrder}, mo.order_id DESC
ORDER BY mo.expected_arrived_date ${sortOrder}, mo.order_id DESC
ORDER BY mo.order_date DESC, mo.order_id DESC
ORDER BY FIELD(mo.order_status,'초안','요청','승인','입고완료'), mo.order_date DESC, mo.order_id DESC
ORDER BY mo.order_date DESC, mo.order_id DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT CONCAT( 'PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD( IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(order_id, 16, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) FROM material_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_order ( order_id, supplier_id, order_date, order_status, expected_arrived_date, created_by, handled_by, note, work_order_id ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{supplierId}, #{orderDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{orderStatus}, #{expectedArrivedDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{createdBy}, #{handledBy}, #{note}, #{workOrderId} )

INSERT INTO material_order_item ( order_item_id, order_id, material_id, work_order_id, order_quantity, unit_price, total_price, warehouse_code ) VALUES ( #{orderItemId}, #{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{workOrderId}, #{orderQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unitPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{warehouseCode} )

INSERT INTO material_order_item ( order_item_id, order_id, material_id, work_order_id, order_quantity, unit_price, total_price, warehouse_code ) VALUES ( #{orderItemId}, #{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{workOrderId}, #{orderQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unitPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{warehouseCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.material_name AS materialName, s.supplier_id AS supplierId, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, si.unit_price AS unitPrice, m.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id JOIN supplier s ON si.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND s.status = '활성' AND si.supply_available = 'Y' AND m.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.purchasable_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY s.supplier_name ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT CONCAT( 'PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD( IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(order_id, 16, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) FROM material_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
INSERT INTO material_order ( order_id, supplier_id, order_date, order_status, expected_arrived_date, handled_by, note, work_order_id ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{supplierId}, NOW(), COALESCE(#{orderStatus}, '초안'), #{expectedArrivedDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{handledBy}, #{note}, #{workOrderId} )

insert.if:
INSERT INTO material_order_item ( order_item_id, order_id, material_id, work_order_id, order_quantity, unit_price, total_price, warehouse_code ) VALUES
( #{item.orderItemId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.workOrderId}, #{item.orderQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.unitPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.totalPrice, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.warehouseCode} )

mapper.select:
SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName FROM material m WHERE m.purchasable_flag = 'N' AND m.material_id IN
#{id}

SELECT mo.order_id AS orderId, mo.order_status AS orderStatus, mo.supplier_id AS supplierId, mo.order_date AS orderDate, mo.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate, mo.created_by AS createdBy, mo.note, moi.order_item_id AS orderItemId, moi.material_id AS materialId, moi.order_quantity AS orderQuantity, moi.unit_price AS unitPrice, moi.total_price AS totalPrice, moi.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, moi.work_order_id AS workOrderId FROM material_order mo JOIN material_order_item moi ON moi.order_id = mo.order_id WHERE mo.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE material_order SET order_status = '요청' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND order_status = '초안'
mapper.select:
SELECT mo.order_id AS orderId, mo.supplier_id AS supplierId, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, mo.order_date AS orderDate, mo.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate, mo.order_status AS orderStatus,
-- 담당자/작성자 ID mo.handled_by AS handledBy, mo.created_by AS createdBy,
-- 담당자/작성자 이름(admin_user.name) au_h.name AS handlerName, au_c.name AS createdByName,
mo.note AS note, mo.work_order_id AS workOrderId FROM material_order mo JOIN supplier s ON s.supplier_id = mo.supplier_id LEFT JOIN admin_user au_h ON au_h.admin_id = mo.handled_by LEFT JOIN admin_user au_c ON au_c.admin_id = mo.created_by WHERE mo.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT moi.order_item_id AS orderItemId, moi.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, moi.order_quantity AS orderQuantity, moi.unit_price AS unitPrice, moi.total_price AS totalPrice, moi.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, moi.work_order_id AS workOrderId FROM material_order_item moi JOIN material m ON m.material_id = moi.material_id WHERE moi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY moi.order_item_id
SELECT order_status as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM material_order GROUP BY order_status
